title: CleanSpark Exceeds 14 EH/s as Sandersville Expansion Comes Online
text: CleanSpark announced it exceeded 14 EH/s as the Sandersville, Georgia facility expansion came online. The company finished energizing the first 100 MW of its expansion in Sandersville, Georgia, increasing its fleetwide operating hashrate to over 14 exahashes per second (EH/s) as of February 2024. The facility is undergoing a planned 150MW expansion that will further increase production capacity. The Sandersville facility represents a key hub in CleanSpark's Georgia operations, which currently span over 400 MW of infrastructure. The facility is CleanSpark's fourth data center in Georgia and operates primarily on low-carbon power. The expansion demonstrates CleanSpark's ability to execute large capital projects while maintaining operational continuity.
